시편 124:1.content: If it had not been Yahweh who was on our side, let Israel now say,

시편 124:2.content: if it had not been Yahweh who was on our side, when men rose up against us;

시편 124:3.content: then they would have swallowed us up alive, when their wrath was kindled against us;

시편 124:4.content: then the waters would have overwhelmed us, the stream would have gone over our soul;

시편 124:5.content: then the proud waters would have gone over our soul.

시편 124:6.content: Blessed be Yahweh, who has not given us as a prey to their teeth.

시편 124:7.content: Our soul has escaped like a bird out of the fowler’s snare. The snare is broken, and we have escaped.

시편 124:8.content: Our help is in Yahweh’s name, who made heaven and earth.
